title: Basic Visuals
description: this modpack adds visual effects to enhance Minecraft’s graphics and atmosphere.
body:
# Basic Visuals
![Visuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4954854e415c32eb3c68bcc6bc393aca791c9f1.png)
## Overview:
[Basic Visuals] is a lightweight, performance-friendly modpack designed to serve as the foundation for modpacks. With a focus on visual enhancements, this modpack optimizes key aspects of the game while maintaining smooth performance, ensuring a seamless experience even on lower-end systems.

## Key Features:

**Inventory Mods:** 
- [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping)
  
- [Inventory Particles](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-interactions-mod) - Adds particle effects inside the inventory

- and more

**Improved Particles:** 
- [Particle Interactions](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-interactions-forgified) - adds more particle to blocks
  
-  [Particle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-effects) - adds better particles to effects

**Better Environment:** 
- [Biome Bloom](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biome_bloom/versions) - changes the fog
  
- [Refreshed Lighting](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refreshed-lighting) - changes the Lighting
  
- [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds)

> and more
